basic_details.job_title: CUSAT Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Cochin University of Science and Technology (CUSAT)
basic_details.short_information: Cochin University of Science and Technology (CUSAT) Assistant Professor Notification 2026 has been released on 15 May 2026 on the official website of CUSAT. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CUSAT Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in Mathematics with 55% marks, Cleared NET/SLET/SET or awarded Ph.D.
qualification.details: Master's degree in Mathematics with 55% marks (or an equivalent grade in a point scale wherever the grading system is followed) from an Indian University, or an equivalent degree from an accredited foreign University. Besides fulfilling the above qualifications, the candidate must have cleared the National Eligibility Test (NET) conducted by the UGC, CSIR or similar test accredited by the UGC like SLET/SET or who are or have been awarded a Ph.D. Degree in accordance with the University Grants Commission (Minimum Standards and Procedure for Award of M.Phil./Ph.D. Degree) Regulations, 2009 or 2016 and their amendments from time to time as the case may be exempted from NET/SLET/SET. Essential: Ph.D. degree awarded in regular mode, thesis evaluated by at least two external examiners, open Ph.D viva voce conducted, published two research papers (at least one in refereed journal), presented at least two papers in conference/seminars sponsored/funded/supported by UGC/ICSSR/CSIR or any similar agency. OR Ph.D. from foreign university/institution ranked among top 500 in world ranking (QS, THE, ARWU).

salary_details.details: For Ph.D holder - ₹ 42,000/- For rest of the contract teachers - ₹ 40,000/-

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CUSAT Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CUSAT to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CUSAT Assistant Professor recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the CUSAT Assistant Professor (Contract basis) posts is 15th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Master's degree in Mathematics with 55% marks and must have cleared NET/SLET/SET or possess a Ph.D. degree as per UGC regulations.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General/OBC candidates is ₹ 950/-.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for SC/ST candidates is ₹ 195/-.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for the Assistant Professor (Contract basis) post?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 40,000 to Rs. 42,000 per month, with a higher amount for Ph.D. holders.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Assistant Professor (Contract basis) post at CUSAT.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is entirely online through the official CUSAT recruitment portal.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any age limit mentioned for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification should be referred to for specific age limit details and any applicable relaxations.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is Ad.D3/13453/06.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the links for the official notification and the online application form in the "Important Links" section of this article.
